message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "n8n-7939-n8n-is-taking-a-lot-of-ram-memory",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "n8n: n8n is taking a lot of RAM memory",
+    "description": "n8n is taking a lot of RAM memory. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "analyze",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify n8n analyze symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your n8n deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review n8n configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant n8n configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n\nkubectl get configmap -n n8n -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=n8n\n```\nThe n8n process is taking a lot of RAM memory, in this case 1.1 GB, and 41.7 GB of virtual memory.\n\n**To Reproduce**\nSteps to reproduce the behavior:\n\n1. Install n8n using Docker/Portainer\n2."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for n8n is taking a lot of RAM memory",
+        "description": "## Summary\n\nThis PR addresses issue #7939 where users report significant memory growth when using Python in Code nodes. The solution implements a Worker approach that completely resolves the memory leak pattern.\n\nMemory usage comparison charts:\n```yaml\nmy_list = [0] * 1000000\nreturn {\"a\": my_list}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm n8n is taking a lot of RAM memory is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=n8n -n n8n --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n n8n --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Summary\n\nThis PR addresses issue #7939 where users report significant memory growth when using Python in Code nodes. The solution implements a Worker approach that completely resolves the memory leak pattern.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "my_list = [0] * 1000000\nreturn {\"a\": my_list}",
+        "/home/node # top\nMem: 21443940K used, 2516304K free, 1060796K shrd, 307824K buff, 5260444K cached\nCPU:   7% usr  13% sys   0% nic  79% idle   0% io   0% irq   0% sirq\nLoad average: 2.14 2.43 2.29 2/2239 65\n  PID  PPID USER     STAT   VSZ %VSZ CPU %CPU COMMAND\n   23    21 node     S    42.1g 169%   5   0% node /usr/local/bin/n8n\n   52     0 root     S     1672   0%   0   0% sh\n    1     0 root     S     1604   0%   2   0% sh -c whoami pwd npm install -g @mozilla/readability jsdom echo \"done install\" su node -c \"tini -s -- /docker-entrypoint.sh &\" sl\n   65    52 root     R     1600   0%   0   0% top\n   22     1 root     S     1588   0%   2   0% sleep infinity\n   21     1 node     S      816   0%   6   0% tini -s -- /docker-entrypoint.sh\n/home/node # free -h\n              total        used   ",
+        "# n8n with persistent volume Postgres\n# https://raw.githubusercontent.com/n8n-io/n8n/master/docker/compose/withPostgres/docker-compose.yml\n\nversion: '3.8'\n\nvolumes:\n  db_data:\n  main_data:\n\nservices:\n  postgres:\n    image: postgres:11\n    restart: always\n    environment:\n      - POSTGRES_USER=${POSTGRES_USER}\n      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}\n      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB}\n      - POSTGRES_NON_ROOT_USER=${POSTGRES_NON_ROOT_USER}\n      - POSTGRES_NON_ROOT_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_NON_ROOT_PASSWORD}\n    volumes:\n      - db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data\n      - ${N8N_LOCAL_FILES}/n8n-config/init-data.sh:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init-data.sh\n    healthcheck:\n      test: ['CMD-SHELL', 'pg_isready -h localhost -U ${POSTGRES_USER} -d ${POSTGRES_DB}']\n      interval: 5s\n      timeou"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "n8n",
